summary: Large mncharsel decomp/matching PR focused on src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c, adding a substantial implementation for mnCharSel_802640A0 and adjusting several existing character-select functions, headers, types, and target_funcs. Evidence includes changed-file metadata, a truncated diff excerpt, and a bot match report showing mncharsel improvements plus one mncharsel broken match and unrelated report movement in gr units.

key_files.role: Primary implementation file; 974 additions and 74 deletions across 34 hunks, including a large new mnCharSel_802640A0 body and many local matching/type/control-flow adjustments.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c added=974 deleted=74 hunks=34

raw_diff: mncharsel.c include additions and hunks around mnCharSel_8025D1C4, mnCharSel_8025DB34, fn_8025F0E0, mnCharSel_8025FB50, mnCharSel_8025FDEC, mnCharSel_CursorThink, fn_80262648, fn_802633B0, fn_8026407C/mnCharSel_802640A0

key_files.role: Static header updated alongside mncharsel implementation.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mncharsel.static.h added=17 deleted=1 hunks=2

key_files.role: Public mncharsel header touched for one-line prototype or declaration adjustment.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/mncharsel.h added=1 deleted=1 hunks=1

key_files.role: Menu types header touched for one-line type adjustment.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/mn/types.h added=1 deleted=1 hunks=1

key_files.role: Target-function list expanded for this matching work.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: target_funcs.txt added=13 deleted=0 hunks=1

what_changed.text: Added required baselib includes to mncharsel.c, including forward, cobj, gobj, gobjobject, gobjproc, gobjuserdata, lobj, and memory headers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include block additions near top of src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c

what_changed.text: Introduced static GXColor data mnCharSel_804DC580 through mnCharSel_804DC594 plus MODELS and ANIM macros before adding a large mnCharSel_802640A0 implementation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: additions after fn_8026407C include MenMain_cam extern, six static GXColor initializers, MODELS/ANIM macros, and mnCharSel_802640A0

what_changed.text: Adjusted local variable widths and casts in several functions, especially changing small unsigned locals to s32 or int where comparisons and casts required that shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hval/hval2/hval3/hval4 u8 to s32 in mnCharSel_8025DB34
raw_diff: val u8 to s32 in fn_8025F0E0
raw_diff: player and icon_idx changes in mnCharSel_8025FB50 and mnCharSel_8025FDEC
raw_diff: grabbed u8 to int in mnCharSel_CursorThink
raw_diff: port u8 to int in fn_802633B0

what_changed.text: Replaced some temporary pointer aliases and raw pointer reinterpretations with direct typed field access in mnCharSel_803F0DFC and related CSS structures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed scroll_flag/page_target/page_current pointer locals in fn_8025F0E0
raw_diff: HSD_SisLib_803A746C argument changed from *(HSD_Text**) &mnCharSel_803F0DFC.xd3 to mnCharSel_803F0DFC.xd3
raw_diff: TextKerning* tmp cast replacing UNK_T in mnCharSel_8025D1C4

what_changed.text: Changed some matching/control-flow shapes, including a costume-selection loop rewritten as while(1) with an explicit break once isDuplicateCostume is false.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnCharSel_8025FB50 costume loop changed from while (isDuplicateCostume(door)) to while (1) with break

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded overall matched-code improvement of +1600 bytes and matched-data improvement of +32 bytes, with mncharsel improvements led by mnCharSel_802640A0 rising from 0.00% to 86.22%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: Report for GALE01 matched code 69.17% (+0.04%, +1600 bytes), matched data 41.19% (+0.00%, +32 bytes)
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnCharSel_802640A0 +8811 bytes, 0.00% to 86.22%

smart_moves.text: The PR routes newly needed declarations through headers/includes rather than relying only on source-local unknown declarations, as shown by added baselib includes and touched mncharsel/type headers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: baselib include additions
changed_files.jsonl: mncharsel.h, mncharsel.static.h, and types.h changed

smart_moves.text: Several edits improve typed access and reviewability by replacing UNK_T or pointer-to-field aliases with typed locals or direct struct fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TextKerning* tmp in mnCharSel_8025D1C4
raw_diff: direct mnCharSel_803F0DFC.scroll_flag/xcd/xce/xd3 access in fn_8025F0E0

smart_moves.text: The large new function was landed with a visible automated diff report rather than only a source diff; the report identifies both progress and regressions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: improvements, broken match, and regressions sections

decomp_lessons.text: For mncharsel matching, signedness and local width can be more important than nominal storage width: values sourced from u8 fields or cast to u8 were sometimes kept in s32/int locals to match surrounding comparisons and codegen.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hval variables changed to s32 while assignments retain (u8) casts
raw_diff: player/grabbed/port locals changed from u8/s8 to int
raw_diff: val changed from u8 to s32

decomp_lessons.text: When a global struct field is known and reused, direct field access can be a better decomp form than creating pointer aliases to adjacent u8 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8025F0E0 removed u8* scroll_flag/page_target/page_current and used mnCharSel_803F0DFC.scroll_flag/xcd/xce directly

decomp_lessons.text: Local typed aliases can make large menu code more tractable, but the evidence only shows specific uses, not a general rule: examples include CSSData* css and CSSIcon* icons.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: CSSData* css = mnCharSel_804D6CB0 in fn_80262648
raw_diff: CSSIcon* icons = (CSSIcon*) (&mnCharSel_803F0A48 + 1) in mnCharSel_8025FB50 and mnCharSel_8025FDEC

naming_conventions.text: Recovered or introduced locals use short role names already common in decomp work, such as css, icons, text, jobj, gobj, color, num_players, row_a, and row_b.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnCharSel_802640A0 local declarations
raw_diff: CSSData* css in fn_80262648
raw_diff: CSSIcon* icons in mnCharSel_8025FB50 and mnCharSel_8025FDEC

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names remain for not-yet-semantically-named globals and functions, including mnCharSel_804DC580-style color statics and mnCharSel_802640A0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static GXColor mnCharSel_804DC580 through mnCharSel_804DC594
raw_diff: s32 mnCharSel_802640A0(void)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Local declaration order was adjusted in mnCharSel_8025D1C4 by moving temp_r30 assignment after temp_r29 and var_f31.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnCharSel_8025D1C4 temp_r30 assignment moved

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: A narrow PAD_STACK tactic remains in mnCharSel_8025FB50, reduced from PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(8), but the slice does not include explicit objdiff rationale for the stack padding itself.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnCharSel_8025FB50 PAD_STACK(16) changed to PAD_STACK(8)
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR uses typed casts around helper returns and table bases, such as casting HSD_SisLib_803A6478 to TextKerning* and deriving CSSIcon* from &mnCharSel_803F0A48 + 1.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TextKerning* tmp = (TextKerning*) HSD_SisLib_803A6478(...)
raw_diff: CSSIcon* icons = (CSSIcon*) (&mnCharSel_803F0A48 + 1)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The bot report gives verification-style evidence of progress but not a clean all-green result: it lists mncharsel improvements, one broken mncharsel match, and two unrelated gr regressions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: broken match mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter 100.00% to 99.90%
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: regressions grGreens_80215ED8 and fn_80215B84

notes: PR body is empty, and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The raw diff is truncated; the large mnCharSel_802640A0 body and header/type/target_funcs details are not fully visible.
The bot report provides match-progress evidence but includes unrelated gr unit movements despite changed-file metadata listing mncharsel and target_funcs/header files only.
No explicit author explanation, objdiff command output, or rationale is available for tactics such as PAD_STACK or specific declaration-order changes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed field access instead of pointer aliases when recovering mncharsel state
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2536 supports a narrow lesson for mncharsel: when fields in mnCharSel_803F0DFC are known, direct field access can replace local u8* aliases and reinterpret casts, improving typed-source recovery while matching work proceeds.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed scroll_flag/page_target/page_current pointer aliases
raw_diff: mnCharSel_803F0DFC.xd3 used directly as HSD_Text* argument

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local width changes can be matching-sensitive in mncharsel
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2536 repeatedly changes locals from u8/s8 to s32/int while preserving casts at assignment or use sites, suggesting that local width and signedness should be tested deliberately in mncharsel matching rather than inferred only from field storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hval variables changed to s32
raw_diff: player/grabbed/port locals changed to int
raw_diff: c_kind changed to s8 and icon_idx to int

source_update_candidates.title: Document that small field values may need wider locals for MWCC codegen
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a note under matching tactics or authored-source style: for MWCC matching, values loaded from u8/s8 fields may still need s32/int locals with explicit casts at assignment or comparison sites. PR 2536 shows this pattern in mncharsel, but broader acceptance should require more examples.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hval/hval2/hval3/hval4 u8 to s32
raw_diff: val u8 to s32
raw_diff: grabbed and port u8 to int
source_update_candidates.reason: The pattern is repeated in the PR and may be reusable, but the slice lacks explicit objdiff rationale and should be curator-reviewed before becoming a global standard.

source_update_candidates.title: mncharsel.c PR 2536 introduced large partial mnCharSel_802640A0 recovery
source_update_candidates.text: Record as a candidate path fact that PR 2536 substantially implemented mnCharSel_802640A0 in src/melee/mn/mncharsel.c and improved its report score from 0.00% to 86.22%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added s32 mnCharSel_802640A0(void)
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnCharSel_802640A0 +8811 bytes, 0.00% to 86.22%
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful historical path fact for future mncharsel work, but should be checked against current source and later PRs before source-corpus promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK(8) in mnCharSel_8025FB50 as accepted style from this slice alone; the diff shows the tactic but not the required narrow verifier rationale.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or intent; no human review comments are present.
Do not claim all touched mncharsel functions matched; the bot report shows improvements plus one broken mncharsel match, not a clean completion.
Do not treat the unrelated gr unit match movements in the bot report as authored changes in this PR without further evidence; changed-file metadata does not list gr source files.
